prompt: A luxury beauty editorial close-up of a confident young woman with shoulder-length chestnut curls gently tousled by a warm breeze, her head turned slightly toward the camera with an intense, captivating expression. Radiant golden skin catches the soft glow of the late afternoon sun, while natural freckles and luminous highlights enhance a fresh, authentic look. out-of-focus desert wildflowers and agave leaves create a dreamy foreground frame, with a muted sandstone landscape softly blurred in the background. Warm amber backlighting, delicate shadow patterns across her face, shallow depth of field, premium fashion magazine aesthetic, cinematic color grading, ultra-realistic skin texture, 85mm lens, vertical composition
